ddls:
CREATE TABLE "weather_data" (
  "data_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each weather data record */,
  "state_code" INTEGER /* State code where the data was collected */,
  "station_id" INTEGER /* ID of the station where the data was collected */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year the data was collected */,
  "month" INTEGER /* Month the data was collected */,
  "day" INTEGER /* Day the data was collected */,
  "temperature" REAL /* Temperature recorded */,
  "precipitation" REAL /* Precipitation recorded */,
  "wind_speed" REAL /* Wind speed recorded */,
  "humidity" REAL /* Humidity recorded */,
  "collection_method" TEXT /* Data collection method used */,
  "collection_frequency" TEXT /* Frequency of data collection */,
  "data_source" TEXT /* Source of the data */,
  "data_quality" TEXT /* Quality of the data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_weather_data_state_code FOREIGN KEY ("state_code") REFERENCES states ("state_code"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_weather_data_station_id FOREIGN KEY ("station_id") REFERENCES weather_stations ("station_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "states" (
  "state_code" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each state */,
  "state_name" TEXT /* Name of the state */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country where the state is located */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("state_code")
)

CREATE TABLE "weather_stations" (
  "station_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each weather station */,
  "station_name" TEXT /* Name of the weather station */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the weather station */,
  "location_description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the station location */,
  "elevation" REAL /* Elevation of the weather station */,
  "state_code" INTEGER /* State code where the station is located */,
  "station_type" TEXT /* Type of weather station */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("station_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "temperature_data" (
  "temperature_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each temperature data record */,
  "data_id" INTEGER /* ID of the weather data record */,
  "temperature" REAL /* Temperature recorded */,
  "unit" TEXT /* Unit of temperature (e.g., Celsius, Fahrenheit) */,
  "data_description" TEXT /* Brief description of the temperature data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("temperature_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_temperature_data_unit FOREIGN KEY ("unit") REFERENCES temperature_units ("unit_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_temperature_data_data_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_id") REFERENCES weather_data ("data_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "precipitation_data" (
  "precipitation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each precipitation data record */,
  "data_id" INTEGER /* ID of the weather data record */,
  "precipitation" REAL /* Precipitation recorded */,
  "unit" TEXT /* Unit of precipitation (e.g., mm, inches) */,
  "data_description" TEXT /* Brief description of the precipitation data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("precipitation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_precipitation_data_unit FOREIGN KEY ("unit") REFERENCES precipitation_units ("unit_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_precipitation_data_data_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_id") REFERENCES weather_data ("data_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "wind_speed_data" (
  "wind_speed_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each wind speed data record */,
  "data_id" INTEGER /* ID of the weather data record */,
  "wind_speed" REAL /* Wind speed recorded */,
  "unit" TEXT /* Unit of wind speed (e.g., m/s, mph) */,
  "data_description" TEXT /* Brief description of the wind speed data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("wind_speed_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_wind_speed_data_unit FOREIGN KEY ("unit") REFERENCES wind_speed_units ("unit_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_wind_speed_data_data_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_id") REFERENCES weather_data ("data_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "humidity_data" (
  "humidity_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each humidity data record */,
  "data_id" INTEGER /* ID of the weather data record */,
  "humidity" REAL /* Humidity recorded */,
  "unit" TEXT /* Unit of humidity (e.g., %) */,
  "data_description" TEXT /* Brief description of the humidity data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("humidity_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_humidity_data_unit FOREIGN KEY ("unit") REFERENCES humidity_units ("unit_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_humidity_data_data_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_id") REFERENCES weather_data ("data_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., meteorologist, data analyst, admin) */,
  "role_description" TEXT /* Brief description of the user's role */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department the user belongs to */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "data_id" INTEGER /* ID of the weather data record being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the data */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the data was accessed */,
  "access_time" TEXT /* Time when the data was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_data_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_id") REFERENCES weather_data ("data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "temperature_units" (
  "unit_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each temperature unit */,
  "unit_name" TEXT /* Name of the temperature unit */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the temperature unit */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("unit_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "precipitation_units" (
  "unit_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each precipitation unit */,
  "unit_name" TEXT /* Name of the precipitation unit */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the precipitation unit */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("unit_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "wind_speed_units" (
  "unit_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each wind speed unit */,
  "unit_name" TEXT /* Name of the wind speed unit */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the wind speed unit */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("unit_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "humidity_units" (
  "unit_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each humidity unit */,
  "unit_name" TEXT /* Name of the humidity unit */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the humidity unit */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("unit_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_versions" (
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data version */,
  "data_id" INTEGER /* ID of the weather data record */,
  "version_number" INTEGER /* Version number of the data */,
  "version_date" TEXT /* Date when the data version was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_versions_data_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_id") REFERENCES weather_data ("data_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "teams" (
  "team_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each team */,
  "team_name" TEXT /* Name of the team */,
  "team_description" TEXT /* Brief description of the team */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "team_members" (
  "member_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each team member */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the team member */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("member_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_team_members_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_team_members_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)
